title: This is what you get if you play on a server while admins are on.
description:
EXPLOSIONS AND RANDOMLY PITCH SHIFTED SOUNDS EVERYWHERE
...And lots of fun.
Also thanks to the guy micspamming that song, it was fitting as fuck.

Recorded on Steveh's Server #1
